Operation 'deleteTimeTracker' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. The current summary is acceptable but generic. The improved description clarifies: (1) what is being deleted (specific time tracker by ID), (2) authentication/permission requirements, (3) the permanent nature of the deletion, (4) what response to expect, and (5) that the action is irreversible. This helps AI agents understand when and how to use this destructive operation and what consequences to expect.

message: Operation 'createTimeTracker' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear and actionable but description is missing. data.description_suggestion: Creates a new time tracker entry to log work time on a task. Accepts a TimeTrackerCreate object in the request body containing task ID, duration, and optional description. Returns the created TimeTracker object with ID, timestamps, and tracking details. The time entry is immediately recorded and can be used for time reporting and project analytics.

data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing time tracker entry with new information. Requires the time tracker ID as a path parameter and accepts a TimeTrackerUpdate object in the request body containing fields to modify such as duration or description. Returns the updated TimeTracker object. Partial updates are supported - only provided fields will be modified. Changes are immediately reflected in time reports.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve board structure without task data

Operation 'deleteTimeTracker' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. The current summary is acceptable but generic. The description is completely empty, which is a critical issue for AI agent interpretability. The improved description clarifies: (1) what is being deleted (specific time tracker by ID), (2) authentication/permission requirements, (3) the permanent nature of the deletion, (4) what response to expect, and (5) that the action is irreversible. This helps AI agents understand when and how to use this destructive operation and what consequences to expect.

data.description_suggestion: Deletes a specific time tracker record by ID. Requires authentication and appropriate permissions. The time tracker entry will be permanently removed from the system. Returns a confirmation response indicating successful deletion. This action cannot be undone.

The improved description clarifies: (1) what is being deleted (specific time tracker by ID), (2) authentication/permission requirements, (3) the permanent nature of the deletion, (4) what response to expect, and (5) that the action is irreversible. This helps AI agents understand when and how to use this destructive operation and what consequences to expect.
